verses.text: Eliashib the high priest and his fellow priests lead the way, building and sanctifying the sheep gate. The spiritual leaders set the first example of labour. When those who serve at the altar take up the common work, the whole people are stirred to follow.

Eliashib the high priest and his fellow priests lead the way, building and sanctifying the sheep gate. The spiritual leaders set the first example of labour. When those who serve at the altar take up the common work, the whole people are stirred to follow.

Group after group repairs its portion of the wall, yet the nobles of Tekoa 'put not their necks to the work of their Lord.' Most labour willingly; a proud few will not stoop. In God's work the humble many carry what the self-important refuse to touch.

Group after group repairs its portion of the wall, yet the nobles of Tekoa 'put not their necks to the work of their Lord.' Most labour willingly; a proud few will not stoop. In God's work the humble many carry what the self-important refuse to touch.

Group after group repairs its portion of the wall, yet the nobles of Tekoa 'put not their necks to the work of their Lord.' Most labour willingly; a proud few will not stoop. In God's work the humble many carry what the self-important refuse to touch.

Section by section the people repair the wall, many building 'over against' their own houses, each taking the piece nearest at hand. The great work is divided among willing hands. When every one mends the part before his own door, the whole is soon restored.
